title: leucas deflexa var. biglomerulata
intro: Leucas deflexa var. biglomerulata is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as the mint family, and is native to tropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Leucas deflexa var. biglomerulata include its potential to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and relieve pain. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
